description: Use this API to remove all generation reserve units associated with a particular period reserve constraint in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = opf_perrsv_reset(rsvid)

parameters.name: rsvid
parameters.description: Period reserve identifier (1 through 15). (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
